SQL Injection.description: Injection of SQL queries through user input, allowing unauthorized data access or manipulation
SQL Injection.testing_approach: Inject payloads into input fields, URL parameters, headers, and cookies; observe response differences

Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).description: Injection of malicious scripts into web pages viewed by other users
Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).testing_approach: Test input reflection, bypass filters using various encoding and obfuscation techniques

Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF).description: Making the server perform unintended requests to internal or external resources
Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF).testing_approach: Test URL parameters with internal IPs, cloud metadata endpoints, and protocol handlers

Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR).description: Accessing resources by manipulating identifiers without proper authorization checks
Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR).testing_approach: Enumerate object references, test access with different user sessions, check for authorization bypass

Remote Code Execution (RCE).description: Executing arbitrary code on the target server through vulnerabilities
key_indicators: Template injection leading to code exec
Remote Code Execution (RCE).testing_approach: Test for command injection, unsafe deserialization, template injection, file upload with code execution

Authentication Bypass.description: Circumventing authentication mechanisms to access protected resources
Authentication Bypass.testing_approach: Map authentication flow, test for bypass in alternative endpoints, manipulate session tokens

Privilege Escalation.description: Elevating access from lower to higher privilege levels
Privilege Escalation.testing_approach: Enumerate user roles, test parameter manipulation, check function-level authorization

XML External Entity (XXE).description: Exploiting XML parsers to access internal files or perform SSRF
XML External Entity (XXE).testing_approach: Inject XML entities, test for file read and SSRF capabilities, check parser configurations

Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF).description: Tricking authenticated users into performing unintended actions
Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF).testing_approach: Identify state-changing operations, test for anti-CSRF protections, craft PoC pages

File Upload.description: Uploading malicious files that can lead to code execution or other attacks
File Upload.testing_approach: Test file type validation, extension bypass, content-type checks, double extensions

Subdomain Takeover.description: Taking control of subdomains pointing to unclaimed third-party services
Subdomain Takeover.testing_approach: Enumerate subdomains, check DNS records, verify service claim status

Open Redirect.description: Redirecting users to arbitrary external sites through vulnerable parameters
Open Redirect.testing_approach: Test redirect parameters with various payloads, check for filter bypasses

Business Logic.description: Exploiting flaws in application logic to manipulate intended behavior
Business Logic.testing_approach: Map business processes, test step ordering, manipulate values, check state transitions

JWT Vulnerabilities.description: Flaws in JSON Web Token implementation allowing token manipulation
JWT Vulnerabilities.testing_approach: Decode tokens, test algorithm confusion, brute-force weak keys, test token manipulation

GraphQL.description: Vulnerabilities specific to GraphQL API implementations
GraphQL.testing_approach: Enable introspection, map schema, test for injection, check authorization, test batching

Race Condition.description: Exploiting timing issues in concurrent operations to manipulate application state
Race Condition.testing_approach: Identify atomic operations, send concurrent requests, analyze state changes

Cache Poisoning.description: Manipulating cache to serve poisoned content to other users
Cache Poisoning.testing_approach: Identify cache behavior, test unkeyed inputs, poison cache with malicious content

Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI).description: Injecting template expressions that execute on the server
Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI).testing_approach: Identify template engine, test injection syntax, escalate to RCE if possible

Local File Inclusion (LFI).description: Including and reading local files through path manipulation
Local File Inclusion (LFI).testing_approach: Test path traversal sequences, use null bytes if applicable, test for log poisoning to RCE

CRLF Injection.description: Injecting carriage return and line feed characters to manipulate HTTP responses
CRLF Injection.testing_approach: Inject CRLF sequences, test for response splitting, header injection
